document_id.description: Unique identifier of the source file or invoice entry.

vendor.description: Name of the merchant or seller.

amount_total_inr.description: Total gross amount paid including taxes.

gst_paid_inr.description: GST component paid (if present on invoice).

description.description: Description of items or services purchased.

category.description: Business expense category (e.g., Office Supplies, Software SaaS, Rent, Personal).

payment_mode.description: Mode of payment, critical for Sec 44AD calculations.
